name: com.minoritynarrative.engine
description: Cultural storytelling tools and templates for indie devs from underrepresented communities. Supports Black American, Indigenous, Southeast Asian, and Latinx narrative contexts with built-in code-switching, honorifics, collective/individual choice framing, and community relationship systems.

samples.displayName: The Last Ride of Isaiah Free
samples.description: A Black American western demo story. Isaiah Free, a freedman bounty hunter in 1870s Texas, faces a choice between personal revenge and protecting his community.
